title: Storyboard source health
description: Generic Health Dashboard integration for a remote Storyboard access server provider. Pass storyboardUrl to run this profile against onboarding, bcn, or any compatible Storyboard access URL.

checks.title: Provider schema and source evidence
checks.repairHint: Start or repair the storyboard access server where the storyboard files live, then confirm /health-provider returns ok: true with sourceTargets and definitions.

checks.title: Provider health rows pass
checks.repairHint: Use the Storyboard provider run-check-all action or the linked storyboard editor Run controls; only typed provider action run-check-all is executable here, unsupported repairs stay as hints.
